sgTip: Equip the Yellow Shield on Tidus immediately — Lightningproof stops random strike damage. Kimahri's Spirit Lance requires praying at 3 Qactuar stones (press Square near each).

subLocations.name: Thunder Plains South
subLocations.prose: Lightning strikes here can interrupt any battle — most enemies are lightning-based, so equip weapons with Waterstrike and grab the Yellow Shield from the chests near the entrance for Tidus. The Qactuar stones scattered across the plains are optional but unlock Kimahri's Spirit Lance: pray at three glowing cactuar-engraved stones and a ghost leads you to the buried chest. Two stones are in the south section.

subLocations.name: Thunder Plains North
subLocations.prose: Stop at the Travel Agency in the middle section — speak to Rikku first, then Rin. When he asks how your Al Bhed studies are going, choose the affirmative response and he hands over Primer XIV. The third Qactuar stone for the Spirit Lance is also in this north section. The lightning dodge challenge for the Venus Sigil is here too, but save that for later when you can equip No Encounter armor.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIV (say 'Okay' to Rin after talking to Rikku)
Spirit Lance (Kimahri's Celestial Weapon — pray at 3 stones)
